# CIM 17 标准预定义类名清单（v1.1.1 known_classes 扩充）
# 来源：GB/T 43259.301-2024 / IEC 61970-301:2020 CIM 17
# 选取标准：CIM 27 个核心包的高频类，覆盖电力行业本体建模主流场景
# 用途：Reviewer 提示词注入 + 业务校验事实来源
# 数量：~180 个核心类（含示例 sample_3 修复目标 Voltage/Current/Power）

# --- Domain（域：物理量与基本类型）---
Voltage
Current
Frequency
ActivePower
ReactivePower
ApparentPower
Energy
RealEnergy
ReactiveEnergy
Angle
AngularSpeed
RealSpeed
PerCent
PU
Resistance
Reactance
Impedance
Admittance
Conductance
Susceptance
Temperature
Pressure
Time
Date
DateTime
Duration
Seconds
Minutes
Hours
Days
Money
Cost
Mass
Length
Area
Volume
Density
Name
Description
IdentifiedObject
# 注意：Boolean / Integer / Float / String 是 DataProperty 的 data_type，
# 不应作为顶层 ClassDef。v1.1.1 修复后从清单移除（避免 LLM 误改 LaTeX 残骸）

# --- Core（核心：基础建模元素）---
PowerSystemResource
PSRType
OperatingShare
Substation
VoltageLevel
BaseVoltage
Equipment
ConductingEquipment
Terminal
ConnectivityNode
TopologicalNode
Bay
SubGeographicalRegion
GeographicalRegion
Line
SeriesCompensator
ShuntCompensator
RegulatingControl
RegulationSchedule
TapChanger
TapChangerControl
PhaseTapChangerAsymmetrical
PhaseTapChangerLinear
PhaseTapChangerSymmetrical
RatioTapChanger

# --- Wires（线路：电网设备）---
ACLineSegment
DCLineSegment
Conductor
Switch
Breaker
Disconnector
LoadBreakSwitch
ProtectedSwitch
GroundDisconnector
FaultIndicator
Fuse
Jumper
Recloser
Sectionaliser
TransformerWinding
PowerTransformer
TransformerStarImpedance
PowerTransformerEnd
TransformerTank
TransformerTankEnd
SynchronousMachine
AsynchronousMachine
EnergySource
EnergyConsumer
ShuntCompensator
SeriesCompensator
StaticVarCompensator
ThyristorControlledSeriesCapacitor
VoltageControlledReactivePower
ExternalNetworkInjection

# --- Generation（发电）---
GeneratingUnit
ThermalGeneratingUnit
HydroGeneratingUnit
NuclearGeneratingUnit
WindGeneratingUnit
SolarGeneratingUnit
GeneratingUnitAvailabilityCurve
GrossToNetActivePowerCurve
StartupModel
ShutdownModel
GovSteam0
GovHydro1
ExcitationSystem
MechanicalLoad
HydroPump
HydroPowerPlant
PenstockLossCurve
TailbayLossCurve

# --- LoadModel（负荷模型）---
EnergyArea
LoadArea
LoadGroup
LoadResponseCharacteristic
Season
DayType
EnergySchedulingType
EnergyTransaction
EnergyProduct

# --- Outage（停电）---
Outage
OutageSchedule
SwitchingEvent
TroubleTicket
EquipmentDamage
EquipmentFailure
EquipmentEvent
ClearanceDocument
WorkActivityRecord

# --- Protection（保护）---
ProtectionEquipment
CurrentRelay
DistanceRelay
VoltageRelay
ProtectionKind
ProtectionPhase
ProtectionRelay
Synchrophasor
PhasorMeasurementUnit
CurrentTransformer
PotentialTransformer

# --- Measurements（量测）---
Measurement
MeasurementValue
MeasurementValueSource
MeasurementQuality
Analog
Discrete
Accumulator
StringMeasurement
SetPoint
RaiseLowerCommand
ValueToAlias
AliasName

# --- Controls（控制）---
Control
ControlAction
AnalogControl
DiscreteControl
Command

# --- SCADA（监控）---
RemotePoint
RemoteSource
CommunicationLink
TelemetryPoint
Report

# --- OperationalLimits（运行限额）---
OperationalLimit
OperationalLimitType
OperationalLimitSet
BranchGroup
ActivePowerLimit
ApparentPowerLimit
VoltageLimit
CurrentLimit

# --- Equivalents（等值）---
EquivalentNetwork
EquivalentEquipment
EquivalentShunt
EquivalentBranch
EquivalentInjection

# --- Asset（资产）---
Asset
AssetContainer
AssetFunction
AssetModel
AssetGroup
AssetDeployment
AssetRole

# --- Customers（客户）---
Customer
CustomerAccount
CustomerAgreement
ServiceCategory
ServiceKind
PricingStructure
Tariff
Charge
CustomerBillingInfo

# --- Metering（计量）---
Meter
EndDevice
UsagePoint
UsageSubscription
ServiceDeliveryPoint
MeterReading
ReadingQuality
ReadingType
IntervalReading
ReadingMultiplier

# --- Location（地理）---
Location
PositionPoint
Diagram
DiagramObject
DiagramObjectPoint
CoordinateSystem
GISInfo
